hero.heading: Turn satellite data into qualified solar leads across Europe.
hero.sub: SolarScout Pro automatically detects warehouses, factories and commercial rooftops in Romania, Spain, Portugal, Albania and the United Kingdom — with full business data, estimated roof area and one-click CSV / Excel export.
hero.previewStats: 213 commercial rooftops detected • avg roof area 2,340 m²

features.heading: Everything you need to scout solar leads
features.sub: No spreadsheets. No cold databases. Just a city name and a few seconds.
features.item1Desc: Scan any city or region and instantly surface commercial buildings, warehouses and factories using live OpenStreetMap + Mapbox satellite data.
features.item2Desc: Residential rooftops are automatically filtered out. Focus on the biggest, most profitable solar rooftops first.
features.item3Desc: Business name, category, address, coordinates, roof area, phone, email, website — everything you need to start outreach.
features.item4Desc: Filter by country, city, business type and roof area. Search, sort and slice your pipeline any way you want.
features.item5Desc: Export filtered or selected leads to CSV or .xlsx in one click. Drop them straight into your CRM or outreach tool.
features.item6Desc: Purpose-built for the solar boom in Romania, Spain, Portugal, Albania and the United Kingdom — with localised results and geography.

steps.heading: From city name to qualified leads in under a minute
steps.step1Desc: Type any location in Romania, Spain, Portugal, Albania or the United Kingdom. Autocomplete suggests the best match.
steps.step2Desc: SolarScout scans the area, filters residential buildings and surfaces warehouses, factories and retail parks.
steps.step3Desc: Sort by roof area, contact details or business type. Export the winners to CSV or Excel.

cta.heading: Ready to scout your next 100 solar leads?
cta.sub: Sign in and generate your first list of commercial rooftops in minutes.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: SolarScout Pro is an automated solar lead-generation platform that uses satellite data and OpenStreetMap to detect commercial buildings, warehouses and factories across Romania, Spain, Portugal, Albania and the United Kingdom — turning them into ready-to-contact solar leads.
faq.q2: Which countries does SolarScout Pro cover?
faq.a2: SolarScout Pro currently covers five high-growth European solar markets: Romania, Spain, Portugal, Albania and the United Kingdom.
faq.q3: How does the satellite building detection work?
faq.a3: The platform combines live OpenStreetMap building data with Mapbox satellite imagery to identify commercial and industrial rooftops. Residential buildings are automatically filtered so you only see profitable solar opportunities.
faq.q4: Can I export leads to my CRM?
faq.a4: Yes. You can export your filtered leads to CSV or Excel (.xlsx) in one click and import them directly into any CRM or outreach tool.
faq.q5: Is SolarScout Pro free to use?
faq.a5: SolarScout Pro offers a free tier with core features including satellite-powered detection, lead management and CSV/Excel export. Sign up takes less than a minute.
faq.q6: What data do I get for each lead?
faq.a6: Each lead includes the business name, category, full address, GPS coordinates, estimated roof area, phone number, email, website and Google Solar API insights where available.

howItWorks.heading: Find commercial rooftops. Close solar deals.
howItWorks.sub: SolarScout Pro automates the hardest part of commercial solar sales — finding and qualifying leads. From satellite detection to branded proposal, in minutes.
howItWorks.heroImageAlt: Aerial view of commercial building with solar panels installed
howItWorks.heroCaption: Commercial rooftop — Google Solar API verified
howItWorks.stepsHeading: Three steps from search to signed deal
howItWorks.stepsSub: Every feature is designed to get you from "I need leads" to "here's your proposal" as fast as possible.
howItWorks.step01Title: Point at any city — we do the rest
howItWorks.step01Desc: Type a city or region in any of our five European markets. SolarScout instantly queries OpenStreetMap and Google Places to surface every warehouse, factory, retail park and commercial building with a rooftop worth installing on.
howItWorks.step01b3: Returns dozens of leads per search
howItWorks.step02Title: Google Solar API does the engineering
howItWorks.step02Desc: For every lead, we pull real satellite data from Google's Solar API: maximum panel count, annual energy yield in kWh, CO₂ offset, roof imagery quality and date. Paired with our instant business case engine, you see the payback period and 25-year ROI before you ever pick up the phone.
howItWorks.step03Desc: Generate a 2-page branded proposal with real satellite before/after imagery, pixel-accurate panel overlays, and a complete financial breakdown. Available in 5 languages — Spanish, Portuguese, Romanian, Albanian and English — auto-matched to the lead's country.
howItWorks.multiMarketTitle: One platform. Five booming solar markets.
howItWorks.multiMarketSub: We built SolarScout specifically for the European commercial solar wave. Our data sources, financial models and language support are tailored to each country.
howItWorks.benefitsHeading: Why solar teams switch to SolarScout
howItWorks.benefitsSub: Every feature is built to save you time, reduce manual research and help you send better proposals faster.
howItWorks.b1Desc: What used to take a full day of manual research now happens in under 60 seconds per lead.
howItWorks.b2Desc: Every lead includes roof area, solar potential and an instant business case — no guessing.
howItWorks.b3Desc: Send a professional, data-backed proposal before your competitor even finds the building.
howItWorks.b4Desc: Romania, Spain, Portugal, Albania and the UK — with localised data and multi-language output.
howItWorks.b5Desc: OpenStreetMap, Google Places and Google Solar API — no scraped or stale data.
howItWorks.b6Desc: Proposals and outreach auto-translate to Spanish, Portuguese, Romanian, Albanian or English.
howItWorks.capsHeading: Everything you need in one platform
howItWorks.videoSub: Download our presentation videos to share with your team or customers via WhatsApp, email, or social media.
howItWorks.videoEsDesc: Presentación completa en español — generación automática de leads solares comerciales.
howItWorks.videoSqDesc: Prezantimi i plotë në shqip — gjenerimi automatik i kontakteve për energjinë diellore.
howItWorks.ctaSub: Create your free account and run your first search in under two minutes. No credit card required.
